_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: the proliferation ability was significantly higher in the NF2-EVs HSP90OE group compared to the other groups (NF2-EVs and NF2-EVs HSP90KD)
details: Successfully demonstrated enhanced proliferation when treated with NF2-EVs, with highest proliferation ability in NF2-EVs HSP90OE group
